comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Critical findings remediation progress:
1) score-processor-lambda/requirements.txt (plx-fdaf66)
- Added h11>=0.16.0 and pillow>=10.0.1
- Validation: PYTHONPATH=.:score-processor-lambda pytest score-processor-lambda/tests/test_*.py -v -> 6 passed

2) dashboard/package.json (plx-8a96ad)
- Added targeted npm override: sass -> immutable ^4.3.8
- Regenerated dashboard/package-lock.json
- Validation: npm ls immutable --all and targeted Jest test suite passed

Next step is to run Snyk re-scan (or equivalent CI scan) to confirm critical findings are cleared in the tracker.
